creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Martin Birgmeier from comment #3)
Thanks for the info.

In january I opened bug #206560, which exactly describes the problem with the conflicting libminizip between science/libkml and archivers/minizip. The latter is needed by other ports like multimedia/vlc, emulators/mupen64plus-core, and net-im/psi.

Could you please provide your patch for science/libkml in bug #206560? I really would like to use libkml within graphics/gdal again :)

Many thanks in advance,
Rainer
